name: media-attachments
description: Example declarative extension that exposes linked local attachment metadata and the supported media gallery sidebar widget.

permissions.reason: Reads linked local attachments referenced from Markdown notes.

contributes.label: Linked attachment metadata
contributes.description: Declares image, audio, video, and document attachment fields for local notes.

contributes.label: Media gallery
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported local media gallery sidebar widget for linked images, video, audio, PDFs, and common files.
